---
title: "About"
description: "About Joshua Kunst and this blog."
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/jbkunst
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jbkunst@gmail.com
---

I am Joshua Kunst, a data scientist and R developer based in Chile. I work with
statistics, data visualization, interactive applications, and code that turns
data into useful knowledge.

This blog is a collection of sketches, ideas, experiments, and notes. Some older
posts depend on packages or external data that have changed over time; their
rendered output is preserved as part of the archive.
